x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Standardize close codes and enforce selection via UI policy at incident closure. Target: 80%+ of closed incidents with close code in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c08
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Close Code Consistency</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed incidents in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed incidents found in the last 12 months. Close code consistency cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithCode = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    gaWithCode.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    gaWithCode.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithCode.addQuery('close_code', '!=', '');
    gaWithCode.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithCode.query();
    var withCode = gaWithCode.next() ? parseInt(gaWithCode.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withCode / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed incidents have close_code (last 12 months, ' + withCode + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed incidents have a close code. Now Assist ITSM has consistent closure classification for AI pattern analysis.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed incidents have a close code (target: 80%). Inconsistent closure classification reduces Now Assist AI pattern accuracy.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed incidents have a close code. Now Assist ITSM cannot distinguish resolution patterns without consistent close code data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005952</number>
<order>130</order>
<remediation_guidance>Standardize close codes and enforce selection via UI policy at incident closure. Target: 80%+ of closed incidents with close code in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c08</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
